spec_match.rationale: Perfect representation of private/loopback IP classifier.

interactive.rationale: Supports custom IP/hostname text inputs along with numerous preset buttons, updating preflight request headers on the fly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Clear instruction showing server header responses.

edge_cases.rationale: Identifies local domains (e.g. .local) and IPv6 ULA boundaries.

design_system.rationale: Consistent HTTP line block and status badges.

summary: A functional IP/host classifier showing exact header fields Chrome injects and requires.
